### Banana Strawberry Peach – MR FOG AURA 60K Disposable Vape
SKU: MFUSDPAU015021 | Code: AU21 | Price: $26.99 | Published
Collections: NEW ARRIVALS, DISPOSABLE & PODS, $15以上, ALL DISPOSABLE, MR FOG PRODUCT, MR FOG AURA, POPULAR PRODUCTS
URL: https://www.mrfog.online/products/mr-fog-aura-60k-banana-strawberry-peach
MR FOG AURA 60K BANANA STRAWBERRY PEACH
MR FOG AURA Banana Strawberry Peach blends the smooth sweetness of bananas, the bright sparkle of strawberries, and the mellow richness of peaches into a silky, harmonious profile. It begins with a gentle burst of tropical warmth and transitions into a soft, creamy rhythm that soothes and uplifts. The interplay of these familiar fruits offers a comforting and luxurious moment—perfect for slow mornings, cozy afternoons, or whenever balance and beauty are needed.
Key Features
Up to 60K Puffs:
Redefining Durability & Performance. AURA is MR FOG’s first 60K puff disposable vape, engineered for longevity, smooth delivery, and consistent vapor output. Its extended battery life ensures lasting enjoyment from start to finish.
Three Power Modes:
Personalized Experience at Your Fingertips. Switch effortlessly between ECO (smooth), BOOST (balanced), and TURBO (intense) with just one click. Whether you prefer a mellow session or a full power performance, AURA adapts to your pace.
Explosive Performance with Dual-Mesh Heating:
Equipped with dual-core mesh heating technology, AURA delivers dense vapor output and stable performance. Each puff is bold and rich, preserving clarity and consistency from the first inhale to the last.
Interactive UI, Visualized Airflow Control:
Adjust power, modes, and brightness via the bottom button. Twist the airflow ring to fine-tune your draw, with progress shown at the screen’s bottom—even when the display is asleep.
Fast Charging, Less Waiting:
Type-C fast charging. Smart battery protection ensures safety while reducing downtime, so you stay powered throughout the day.
Iconic Liquid Marble Aesthetics:
The transparent outer shell reveals a fluid marble texture beneath—an elegant and modern look that elevates your device into a true statement piece. Lightweight and smooth in hand, it’s both visually stunning and practical to carry.

########## CATEGORY: MR FOG SWITCH POD POWERBANK (2 products) ##########

### MR FOG Switch Pod  Splash Powerbank
SKU: MFUSBTSP030001 | Code: SWPB02 | Price: $4.99 (was $6.99) | Unpublished
Collections: SWITCH POD POWERBANK, CLOSED POD SYSTEM, MR FOG PRODUCT
URL: https://www.mrfog.online/products/mr-fog-switch-pod-splash-powerbank
MR FOG SWITCH POD SPLASH POWERBANK
MR FOG Switch Pod Splash Powerbank is a dedicated reusable battery module designed to match the MR FOG Switch Pod Kit Splash series. Featuring the same core performance as the original Switch Pod Powerbank, the Splash edition introduces a refreshed exterior design inspired by the cool and vibrant identity of the Splash lineup.
Built with a powerful 1100mAh battery, the Splash Powerbank delivers stable output, fast charging, and seamless compatibility with Switch Pod Pods. Its stylish appearance pairs perfectly with Splash Series pods while maintaining the same flexible two-part vaping system users already love.
The Switch Pod Splash Powerbank works together with Switch Pod Pods to form the complete Switch Pod Kit Splash experience. Users can purchase the Powerbank separately as a replacement device, backup battery, or to match different Splash styles.
Relationship between Splash Powerbank, Kit & Pods
Switch Pod Kit Splash = Splash Powerbank + 1 Switch Pod Pod
Switch Pod Splash Powerbank = Splash edition reusable battery module only
Switch Pod Pods = Compatible pre-filled pods sold separately for replacement or flavor switching
The Splash Powerbank is fully compatible with all Switch Pod Pods and functions identically to the original Switch Pod Powerbank, with the primary difference being the exterior design style.
Key Features
Splash Series Design:
Created to match the visual identity of the Switch Pod Kit Splash series, featuring a refreshed appearance with a cooler and more vibrant style.
1100mAh Main Battery:
Designed for long-lasting performance with stable output and dependable battery life.
2.2" Side Screen – Smart & Interactive:
The large side display shows battery level, mode selection, and device status through a smooth and modern interface.
Supports 3 Power Modes:
Switch between Eco, Boost, and Turbo modes to personalize the vaping experience.
Charges the Pod Automatically:
When connected, the Powerbank recharges the Pod, helping maintain consistent performance throughout the day.
Adjustable Brightness & Smart Memory:
Easily customize screen brightness, while the connected pod remembers the previously selected power mode.
Fast Type-C Charging:
Supports fast Type-C charging for reduced downtime and convenient daily use.
Airflow Control:
Adjust the airflow freely for a smoother and more customized draw.
Specifications
Battery capacity:
1100mAh
Screen:
2.2-inch side display
Charging port:
Type-C fast charging
Modes:
Eco / Boost / Turbo
Connection:
Magnetic pod connection
Compatible with:
Switch Pod Pods only

### MR FOG Switch Pod Powerbank
SKU: MFUSBTSP010001 | Code: SWPB01 | Price: $4.99 (was $6.99) | Published
Collections: NEW ARRIVALS, SWITCH POD POWERBANK, CLOSED POD SYSTEM, MR FOG PRODUCT, MR FOG Limited Time Sale
URL: https://www.mrfog.online/products/mr-fog-switch-pod-powerbank
MR FOG SWITCH POD POWERBANK
MR FOG SWITCH POD Powerbank is the reusable main battery module designed specifically for the Switch Pod Kit. Compact yet powerful, it delivers stable performance, smart interaction, and seamless compatibility with Switch Pod Pods.
Built with a high-capacity 1100mAh battery, the Powerbank not only powers the pod for extended usage but also recharges the pod module when connected, creating a flexible two-part vaping experience designed for convenience and endurance.
The Switch Pod Powerbank works together with Switch Pod Pods to form the complete Switch Pod Kit. Users can also purchase the Powerbank separately as a replacement device or backup battery for their existing pods.
Relationship between Powerbank, Kit & Pods
Switch Pod Kit = Powerbank + 1 Pod
Switch Pod Powerbank = Main reusable battery module only
Switch Pod Pods = Pre-filled pod cartridges with built-in 300mAh battery, sold separately for replacement or flavor switching
The Powerbank and Pods are designed to work seamlessly together through a magnetic connection system, creating the complete Switch Pod experience.
Key Features
1100mAh Main Battery:
Designed for long-lasting performance, the high-capacity battery delivers stable output and supports extended vaping sessions with less downtime.
2.2" Side Screen – Smart & Stylish:
The large side display provides real-time battery information, mode settings, and device status with a clean and modern interface.
3 Power Modes:
Switch freely between Eco, Boost, and Turbo modes to customize the vaping experience based on personal preference.
Charges the pod automatically:
When connected, the Powerbank can recharge the Switch Pod Pods, helping maintain consistent performance wherever you go.
Adjustable Brightness & Smart Memory:
Customize screen brightness for different environments. The connected pod also remembers the last selected power mode to provide a smooth, familiar experience.
Fast Type-C Charging:
Equipped with Type-C fast charging technology for quicker power recovery and reduced waiting time.
Airflow Control:
Fine-tune every draw with the adjustable airflow ring for a more personalized vaping experience.
